events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Drummer Legend
angles.copy: Happy 86th birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr! The man who kept the beat for the Fab Four and beyond. What's your favourite Ringo moment?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist, songwriter, and astrophysicist Sir Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Guitar God Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the incomparable Sir Brian May! Guitar legend, astrophysicist, and rock royalty. What's your go-to Queen track with that signature May sound?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' legendary frontman Sir Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Rock Icon Birthday
angles.copy: Can you believe Mick Jagger is 83 today? The energy, the moves, the voice! Still rocking stages worldwide. What's your favourite Rolling Stones anthem?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: On this day in 1981, MTV launched in the US, forever changing the music landscape with its first video, The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'.

angles.name: MTV Anniversary
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV first hit screens, kicking off with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. The irony isn't lost on us, but it certainly changed everything!

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994, propelling them to global stardom.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed British music forever. From 'Supersonic' to 'Live Forever', what's your standout track?

events.title: Woodstock Festival 57th anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in counterculture history, began on this day in 1969, attracting over 400,000 attendees for three days of peace and music.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years ago today, hundreds of thousands gathered for Woodstock – three days that defined a generation. Imagine being there!

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the world lost the King of Rock 'n' Roll, Elvis Presley, who would have been 91.

angles.name: Elvis Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the King today, 49 years since we lost Elvis Presley. His music and legacy continue to inspire. What's your all-time favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' formidable frontwoman Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! An icon of rock and new wave with The Pretenders. What's your favourite track from her incredible career?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! The voice of a generation, still bringing the rock 'n' roll. What's your favourite Liam tune?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' (1975 re-release) anniversary
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was re-released as a UK single in 1975, continuing its message of peace decades later.

angles.name: Imagine Anniversary
angles.copy: John Lennon's powerful message of 'Imagine' resonates as strongly today as it did when it was re-released as a UK single in 1975. A true classic.

events.title: First iPod released 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple launched the revolutionary first-generation iPod on this day in 2001, changing how we listen to music forever.

angles.name: iPod Anniversary
angles.copy: Remember the click wheel? 25 years ago today, Apple unveiled the original iPod, putting '1,000 songs in your pocket' and revolutionising music on the go.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Bond Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating 64 years since 007 first hit the big screen with 'Dr. No'. What's your favourite Bond theme tune?

events.title: Remembering John Lennon
events.blurb: Today would have been the 86th birthday of The Beatles co-founder and peace activist John Lennon.

angles.name: John Lennon Tribute
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary John Lennon. His music and message continue to inspire generations.
